name: ASUS PRIME B650M-A II-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - 2.5GbE LAN - Front USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C Header
shortName: ASUS PRIME B650M-A II-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 3x
description: Budget-friendly Micro ATX motherboard for AM5 Ryzen systems with DDR5 support and dual video outputs.
